MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-23-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BAKERSFIELD MEMORIAL HOSPITAL'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS CONTINUED TO JULY 3, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 23, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BAKERSFIELD MEMORIAL HOSPITAL (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AND SERVED HEREIN AS "DIGNITY HEALTH DBA BAKERSFIELD MEMORIAL HOSPITAL") JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 15.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BAKERSFIELD MEMORIAL HOSPITAL'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS GRANTED. (CCP SEC. 395.5) THE MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO KERN COUNTY. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. DEFENDANT HAS SUBMITTED EVIDENCE ESTABLISHING THAT IT IS A SEPARATE LEGAL ENTITY FROM DIGNITY HEALTH AND ITS PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS IS IN BAKERSFIELD, CALIFORNIA, LOCATED IN KERN COUNTY. (DECLARATION OF DANIEL K. DIK, EX. A; DECLARATION OF BRENDA ADAMS, PAR. 3.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Change Venue
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Dik, Esq., 818.543.1380, for defendnat Dignity Health dba Bakersfield Memorial Hospital; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BAKERSFIELD MEMORIAL HOSPITAL'S Motion To Change Venue is granted. (CCP sec. 395.5) The matter is transferred to Kern County. Plaintiff shall pay all transfer costs. Defendant has submitted evidence establishing that it is a separate legal entity from Dignity Health and its principal place of business is in Bakersfield, California, located in Kern County. (Declaration of Daniel K. Dik, Ex. A; Declaration of Brenda Adams, par. 3.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Change Venue
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Jul-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT BAKERSFIELD MEMORIAL HOSPITAL's Motion To Change Venue is continued to July 3, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 23, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
